changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_location ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, user_profile_id BIGINT NOT NULL, label VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL, full_address VARCHAR(255), city VARCHAR(128), country VARCHAR(128), appartment_no VARCHAR(10), latitude DECIMAL(10,7), longitude DECIMAL(10,7), is_primary BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, is_deleted BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, deleted_by VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255), updated_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE user_location IS 'Stores multiple locations per user profile';
